case_title: LESLIE PHILLIPS VS. DENNY NGUYEN POENG

docket_entries.description: RECORD REMANDED TO SMALL CLAIMS (NO EXHIBITS RETURNED TO SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2014 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY PHILLIPS, LESLIE
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO APPELLANT POENG, DENNY NGUYEN

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JUN-11-2014 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT AFFIRMED. THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF APR-11-2014 REMAINS THE SAME. JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID PORTER, CLERK J. KONG, D525, NOT REPORTED. THIS JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jun-11-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:40am
Judge Pro Tem David Porter, clerk J. Kong, D525, not reported.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Parties, Previously sworn, repectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Porter.

appellant: Denny Nguyen Poeng - no appearance
